SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED FEB-04-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REGIONAL PROFESSIONAL VIDEO PRODUCTIONS, INC. CARDENAS, JOSEPH F

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REGIONAL PROFESSIONAL VIDEO PRODUCTIONS, INC. CARDENAS, JOSEPH F POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: ONE BASE TRINITY SYSTEM; ONE INPUT COMPOSITE AND Y/C; ONE MULTI-FORMAT COMPONENT, YUV, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $1,500.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $7,038.71 DAMAGES, $1,050.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $174.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,262.71, Y/C AND COMPOSITE; ONE PREVIEW OUTPUT MODULE; ONE VAPOR TRINITOR, SINGLE PENTIUM II 400 MHZ; ONE 19" MONITOR; TWO 128 SDRAM FOR TRINITY; TWO SA-R22U TIME CODE READER. INTEREST $231.60. TOTAL JUDGMENT $8494.31. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT.
